## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content production, competitive analysis, and LLM visibility strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Competitive blogs production to start next week; template and competitor list are finalized](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Scrunch data shows Rapyd lagging in LLM visibility; Stripe dominates with 84% appearance in tracked queries](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Action items identified: increase content publication pace, refresh existing content, and optimize for key prompts where competitors are showing up but Rapyd isn't](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [Decent amount of blog posts completed last week](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Queue still has significant content pending](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Pausing production temporarily is an option to manage workload](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### Competitive Blog Strategy

  - [Template and competitor list finalized](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Production to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [No outstanding questions from the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Scrunch Data Analysis

  - [Rapyd showing up in 33% of top recommendations, 52% in middle](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Overwhelmingly positive sentiment for Rapyd mentions](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Citation rate low at 1%, but context shows 83% of citations are to third-party sources](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Rapyd performing well in specific categories like Stablecoin (2nd place with 8% share)](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### LLM Visibility Optimization

  - [No direct SEO equivalent for LLMs to determine important search terms](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Focus on high-priority, bottom-funnel searches for prompt creation](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Competitive presence feature identifies prompts where competitors appear but Rapyd doesn't](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Suggestion to create content directly addressing these gaps (e.g., "Best checkout.com alternative for businesses in 10 countries")](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Scrunch Tool Access and Reporting

  - [Mark to receive full access to Scrunch dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [GrowthX to include insights in weekly agendas](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Ability to customize date ranges, add competitors, and export data as CSV](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Site Audit Feature

  - [Useful for checking landing pages and ensuring content is optimized for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Previous audit revealed differences between JS and non-JS versions of Rapyd's homepage](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to send Mark an invite to Scrunch dashboard by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Mara to email the list of tracked terms and competitors for Mark's review](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue competitive blog production starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Team to leverage Scrunch data for content optimization and creation](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Mark to explore Scrunch dashboard and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Confirm next week's sync meeting and production schedule](https://fathom.video/share/p-_bqqk5uuQJzGJeYp7ukpPLPg6uRr4_?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
